## Verses (5)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Make a glad sound to the Lord, all the earth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Give worship to the Lord with joy; come before him with a song. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Be certain that the Lord is God; it is he who has made us, and we are his; we are his people, and the sheep to whom he gives food. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Come into his doors with joy, and into his house with praise; give him honour, blessing his name. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | For the Lord is good, and his mercy is never-ending; his faith is unchanging through all generations. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
